Spring Data Core
  1. org.springframework.data.domain

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.domain.Limit

Packages that use Limit
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.domain
Central domain abstractions especially to be used in combination with the Repository abstraction.
org.springframework.data.repository.query
Support classes to work with query methods.
org.springframework.data.repository.query.parser
Support classes for parsing queries from method names.

    Methods in org.springframework.data.domain that return Limit
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Limit
    Limit.of(int max)
    Create a new Limit from the given max value.
    default Limit
    Pageable.toLimit()
    Returns an Limit from this pageable if the page request is paged or Limit.unlimited() otherwise.
    static Limit
    Limit.unlimited()

    Methods in org.springframework.data.repository.query.parser that return Limit
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Limit
    PartTree.getResultLimit()
    Return the number of maximal results to return or Limit.unlimited() if not restricted.
